name: Terror From The Deep

src.description: Each time this model is set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike ability, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 12"of this model:on a 2-4, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 5+, that unit suffers 3 mortal wounds and must take a Battle-shock test.

note: Omits roll condition (2-4 vs 5+) and battle-shock test.

name: Paroxysm (Psychic)

src.description: At the start of the Fight phase, you can select one enemy unit within 12"of and visible to this model and roll one D6:on a 1, this PSYKER suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 2+, until the end of the phase, subtract 1 from the Attacks characteristic of weapons equipped by models in that unit.

note: Omits caster damage risk and actual effect (reduce attacks).

name: Hover

src.description: When you are instructed to Declare Battle Formations, you can declare this model will be in Hover mode. Its Move characteristic changes to 20" and it loses the AIRCRAFT keyword.

note: Omits battle formation declaration and keyword loss context.

name: Singular Purpose

src.description:
At the start of the first battle round, select one of the following:

■ Select one enemy unit. Until the end of the battle, each time this model makes an attack that targets that unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.
■ Select one objective marker. Until the end of the battle, while this model is within range of that objective marker, it has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability and an Objective Control characteristic of 15.

note: Omits choice mechanic; lists all effects as always active.

name: Leader

src.description: Before the battle, CHARACTER units with the Leader ability can be attached to one of their Bodyguard units to form an Attached unit.

note: Oversimplified; omits attachment mechanics, timing, and CHARACTER/Bodyguard keywords.

name: Death Blow

src.description: If this model is destroyed by a melee attack, if it has not fought this phase, roll one D6:on a 4+, do not removeit from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

note: Severely incomplete; missing D6 roll, specific conditions, post-attack timing, and removal sequencing.

name: Apex-beast

src.description: Each time this model makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Hit roll.

note: Target condition uses placeholder 'A' instead of 'Battle-shocked'; missing ranged-attack restriction.

name: Stalking Forward

src.description: Each time this model makes a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move, it can move over models (excluding TITANIC models) and terrain features that are 4"or less in height as if they were not there.

note: Oversimplified; missing height threshold (4"), move-type restrictions, TITANIC exception.

name: Malign Presence (Aura)

src.description:
If this model is your WARLORD, each time your opponent targets a unit from their army with a Stratagem, if that unit is within 12"of this model, increase the cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

Designer’s Note:This ability takes precedence over the Lord of Deceit ability presented in the Balance Dataslate June 2024.

note: Generated text completely wrong; describes unrelated cost-increase mechanic instead of CP refund for own Stratagems.

name: Symbiotic Targeting

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly TYRANIDS model makes an attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

note: Omits crucial targeting restriction (select unit hit by this model's shots, not arbitrary targets).

name: Stealth

src.description: If every model in a unit has this ability, then each time a ranged attack is made against it, subtract 1 from that attack's Hit roll.

note: Missing requirement that every model in unit has ability; applies even if one doesn't.

name: Foul Spores (Aura)

src.description: While a friendly TYRANIDS unit is within 6"of this unit, each time a ranged attack targets that unit, models in that unit have the Benefit of Cover against that attack. In addition, while a friendly TYRANIDS unit (excluding MONSTERS) is within 6"of this unit, models in that unit have the Stealth ability.

note: Incomplete; omits second clause granting Stealth to non-MONSTERS, covers only Benefit of Cover.

name: Adaptive Instincts

src.description:
At the start of the Fight phase, select one of the following:
■ Aggression Imperative:Until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
■ Bioregeneration:Until the end of the phase, each time a saving throw is made for a model in this unit, re-roll a saving throw of 1.

note: Describes only one branch (Aggression); omits choice mechanic and Bioregeneration option.

name: Floating Death

src.description: Each time this unit or an enemy unit ends a move, for each model in this unit that is within 3"of one or more enemy units, select one of those enemy units. That model in this unit is destroyed, then roll one D6:on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

note: Oversimplified; omits per-model tracking, D6 roll with variable results, trigger condition (end of move).

name: Aerial Seeding

src.description: This model must start the battle in Reserves, but neither it nor any units embarked within it are counted towards any limits placed on the maximum number of Reserves units you can start the battle with. This model can be set up in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules. Any units embarked within this model must immediately disembark after it has been set up on the battlefield, and they must be set up more than 9"away from all enemy models. After this model has been set up on the battlefield, no units can embark within it.

note: Placeholder 'deep strike' obscures unique reserved mechanics: auto-disembark, no-embark-after rules.

name: Deadly Demise 1

src.description: When this model is destroyed, roll one D6 before removing it from play. On a 6, each unit within 6" of that model suffers a number of mortal wounds denoted by 1.

note: Condition correct but 'on 6+' should be 'on a 6'; scope unclear (within 6" of model when destroyed).

name: Seed Spore Mines

src.description: Once per turn, in your Shooting phase, when selected to shoot, one unit with this ability can use it instead of making any attacks with its ranged weapons. If it does, you can add one new SPORE MINES unit to your army and set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 48"of this unit and more than 9"horizontally away from all enemy units. That SPORE MINES unit contains 1 model for each model in this unit.

note: Placeholder 'once per round special' obscures specific unit-creation mechanic; phase timing unclear.

name: Fights First

src.description: Units with this ability that are eligible to fight do so in the Fights First step, provided every model in the unit has this ability.

note: Omits requirement that every model has ability and that unit must be eligible.

name: Lone Operative

src.description: Unless part of an Attached unit, this unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 12".

note: Omits exception for Attached units; condition oversimplified (should exclude closest unit from restriction).

name: Feeder Tendrils

src.description: Each time this model destroys an enemy CHARACTER model, you gain 1CP.

note: Missing scope precision: only triggers on CHARACTER model kills, not any enemy model.

name: Fear of the Unseen (Aura)

src.description: While an enemy unit is within 6"of this model, worsen the Leadership characteristic of models in that unit by 1. In addition, in the Battle-shock step of your opponent’s Command phase, if such an enemy unit is below its Starting Strength, it must take a Battle-shock test.

note: Missing Leadership penalty (-1); only captures Battle-shock subtest, not full aura effect.

name: Hypersensory Array

src.description: Once per battle round, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress or Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn.

note: Placeholder 'refund ? CP' unintelligible; actual mechanic is stratagem-cost discount (0CP), once per battle round.

name: Harpoon Barbs

src.description: Once per turn, when an enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model is selected to Fall Back, roll one D6:on a 2+, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

note: Missing trigger (Fall Back move only), once-per-turn restriction, and 2+ threshold (not 2+).

name: Seed Mucolids

src.description: Once per turn, in your Shooting phase, when selected to shoot, one unit with this ability can use it instead of making any attacks with its ranged weapons. If it does, you can add one new MUCOLID SPORES unit containing 1 model to your army and set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is wholly within 18"of this model and more than 9"horizontally away from all enemy units.

note: Placeholder 'once per round special' obscures actual mechanic; distance 18" vs scope unclear.

name: Hive Defences

src.description: You can target this model with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this turn. This model can only be targeted with that Stratagem once per turn.

note: Placeholder 'refund ? CP' fails to convey free Fire Overwatch stratagem access with per-turn limit.

name: Resilient Organism

src.description: Once per battle, when an attack is allocated to this model, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

note: Placeholder '?' obscures 'change damage to 0'; once per battle scope correct.

name: Psychological Saboteur (Aura)

src.description:
While an enemy unit is within 12"of this model, if that unit is Battle-shocked:
■ Each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
■ Each time a friendly TYRANIDS model makes an attack that targets that unit, add 1 to the Wound roll.

note: Generated only captures wound-roll bonus; omits Hit-roll penalty, Battle-shocked condition.

name: Bio-stimulus (Aura)

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the turn, each time a friendly TYRANIDS unit makes a melee attack that targets that enemy unit, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1. The same enemy unit can only be affected by this ability once per turn.

note: Phase and scope incorrect; occurs in Shooting phase, affects melee attacks, affects only one target per turn.

name: Feeding Frenzy

src.description: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Hit roll. If that target is also Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

note: Overspecifies conditions; omits conditional wound bonus (only if target Below Half-strength).

name: Spirit Leech (Aura, Psychic)

src.description: While an enemy unit is within 6"of this unit, if this unit contains a Neurothrope, each time that enemy unit fails a Battle-shock test, it suffers D3 mortal wounds and one model in this unit regains up to D3 lost wounds.

note: Generated text doesn't match official; missing Neurothrope requirement and Battle-shock trigger/healing.

name: Hypnotic Gaze (Psychic)

src.description: At the start of the Fight phase, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model. Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

note: Missing scope precision (Engagement Range only); phase timing correct.

name: Spore Mine Cysts

src.description:
Each time this model ends a Normal move, you can do one of the following:

■ Select one enemy unit it moved over during that move and roll six D6:for each 3+, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
■ Add a new SPORE MINES unit containing D3 models to your army and set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is within 6"of this model and more than 9"horizontally away from all enemy units. You cannot select this option for more than one model per turn.

note: Drastically oversimplified; omits D6 roll mechanism, moved-over targeting, D3 spawning, per-turn limit.

name: Parasitic Infection

src.description: Each time an INFANTRY model is destroyed by an attack made with this model’s barbed ovipositor, after this model has finished making its attacks, you can add one new RIPPER SWARMS unit to your army consisting of D3 models and set it up within 3"of this model. If you do, that RIPPER SWARMS unit can be set up within Engagement Range of the destroyed model’s unit (but not within Engagement Range of any other enemy units).

note: Generated has incorrect conditions and scope; misses INFANTRY requirement and ovipositor-specific wargear.

name: Guardian Organism

src.description: While a CHARACTER model is leading this unit, that CHARACTER model has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

note: Scope unclear; grants Feel No Pain 5+ only to leading CHARACTER, not the unit itself.

name: Death Scream

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from that test.

note: Omits targeting restriction (only units hit by this model's shots) and Battle-shock penalty (-1).

name: Vanguard Predator

src.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target is within range of one or more objective markers, re-roll a Wound roll of 1 as well.

note: Wound-reroll omits condition (only vs units within objective range); hit-reroll always available.

name: Hypertoxic Miasma (Aura)

src.description: At the end of your Movement phase, roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 6"of this model:on a 2-3, that unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 4-5, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that unit suffers D6 mortal wounds.

note: Vastly oversimplified; omits D6 roll with three outcomes (2-3: 1MW, 4-5: D3, 6: D6), phase timing.

name: Burning Spray

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

note: Generated mechanic inverted; official removes Benefit of Cover, generated grants it.

name: Node Lash (Psychic)

src.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll. If the target is Battle-shocked, add 1 to the Wound roll as well.

note: Omits conditional wound bonus (only if target Battle-shocked); otherwise accurate.

name: Psychic Terror (Psychic)

src.description: If one or more Neurotyrants from your army are on the battlefield when you unleash the Shadow in the Warp, subtract 1 from the Battle-shock test each enemy unit on the battlefield must take as a result.

note: Generated text uses broken conditions; describes mechanic but obscures 'Shadow in the Warp' trigger.

name: Neuroloids

src.description:
In your Command phase, you can select up to two friendly TYRANIDS units within 18"of this model’s unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, the selected units are always considered to be within Synapse Range of your army.

Designer’s Note:Place a Neuroloid token next to each selected unit to remind you.

note: Placeholder 'flavor text' useless; actual mechanic grants Synapse Range to selected units until next Command.

name: Skulking Horrors

src.description: Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9"of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to D6".

note: Placeholder 'reactive move' vague; omits D6 distance, per-turn limit, move-trigger scope.

name: Aggressive Leader‑beast

src.description: In your opponent’s Shooting phase, each time an enemy unit has shot, if any models from this unit were destroyed as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6:models in this unit move a number of inches up to this result, but this unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. This unit cannot make a Surge move while it is Battle-shocked or within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, and can only make one Surge move per phase.

note: Generated conditions garbled; omits opponent's Shooting phase, closest-enemy positioning rule, per-phase limit.

name: Defensive Stance

src.description: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, while resolving that Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+, or unmodified Hit rolls of 4+ instead if this unit is within range of an objective marker that you control.

note: Generated says '-4 to hit overwatch' but official grants improved hit values (5+/4+); mechanics reversed.

name: Disruption Bombardment

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy INFANTRY unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is disrupted. While a unit is disrupted, subtract 2 from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

note: Omits INFANTRY restriction and targeting (units hit by shots); duration unclear (opponent's next turn).

name: Neurocytes

src.description: While this unit is within Synapse Range of a friendly TYRANIDS unit (excluding NEUROGAUNT units), it has the SYNAPSE keyword.

note: Placeholder '?"' for range; omits NEUROGAUNT exception clarity; Synapse Range condition vague.

name: Airborne Predator

src.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can FLY, add 1 to the Hit roll.

note: Placeholder 'A' for FLY keyword; otherwise accurate and clear.

name: Spawn Termagants

src.description: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly TERMAGANTS unit within 6"of this model and return up to D3+3 destroyed models to that unit. A TERMAGANTS unit cannot be selected for this ability more than once per phase.

note: Omits +3 modifier (D3+3 vs D3), unclear what 'return' means without CP cost context.

name: Unstoppable Monster

src.description: At the start of each player’s Command phase, this model regains up to D3 lost wounds.

note: Regains wounds, not returns models. Misreports healing mechanism.

name: Encephalic Diffusion (Aura, Psychic)

src.description: While an enemy unit is within 6"of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll and, if that enemy unit is Below Half-strength, subtract 1 from the Wound roll as well.

note: Misses -1 to wound rolls condition (only applies to below half-strength units).

name: Blistering Assault

src.description: Each time an enemy unit is selected to shoot, after that unit has shot, if any models from this unit lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks, this unit can make a Blistering Assault move. If it does, roll one D6, adding 2 to the result:each model in this unit can be moved a distance in inches up to the result, but this unit must finish that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit. When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit. Each unit can only make one Blistering Assault move per phase.

note: Oversimplifies; missing constraint that unit must end close to closest enemy; can't trigger while battle-shocked.

name: Onslaught (Aura, Psychic)

src.description: While a friendly TYRANIDS unit is within 6"of this model, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [ASSAULT] and [LETHAL HITS] abilities.

note: Missing ASSAULT ability (only lists LETHAL HITS).

name: Winged Swarm

src.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.

note: Omits ineligibility to charge after using ability and 6" move cap.

name: Grisly Spectacle

src.description: Each time this model is selected to fight, after resolving its attacks, if one or more enemy units were destroyed by those attacks, each enemy unit within 6"of this model must take a Battle-shock test.

note: Completely wrong; triggers battle-shock test, not fighting on death.

name: Pheromone Trail

src.description: Once per battle round, you can target one model with this ability with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP.

note: Unclear meaning; refunds CP phrasing misleading for 0CP stratagem eligibility.

name: Death From Below

src.description: At the end of your opponent’s turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

note: Omits requirement that unit be out of engagement range; timing (opponent's turn).

name: Digestion Spine

src.description: Each time this model fights, after it has resolved its attacks, if one or more enemy models (excluding Vehicle models) were destroyed as the result of those attacks, this model regains up to D3 wounds.

note: Says 'fights on death' but actually heals wounds; wrong mechanic entirely.

name: Prey Adaptation

src.description: Each time this model's unit is selected to fight, select one of the following abilities to apply to all melee weapons equipped by models in that unit until the end of the phase: ■ [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ■ [LANCE] ■ [LETHAL HITS]

note: Missing LANCE option (lists only Sustained Hits and Lethal Hits); says both gained simultaneously when only one is chosen.

name: Synapse
note: Only lists +1S; omits battle-shock test benefit (3D6 vs 2D6).

name: Shadow in the Warp

src.description: If your Army Faction is TYRANIDS, once per battle, in either player’s Command phase, if one or more units from your army with this ability are on the battlefield, you can unleash the Shadow in the Warp. When you do, each enemy unit on the battlefield must take a Battle-shock test. Each time an enemy unit takes such a Battle-shock test, if it is within 6"of one or more SYNAPSE units from your army, subtract 1 from that test.

note: Oversimplifies; misses -1 modifier for units within 6" of Synapse models.

name: Pouncing Leap

src.description: You can target this unit with the Heroic Intervention Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already used that Stratagem on a different unit this phase.

note: Mostly clear but 'frequency bypass' is jargon; misses phase limit detail.
